raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ taḥs Deenas els. Jo raugi/ Es ispestischu te
nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS: Ka wi no tahtas Semmes/ un ta-
es atgreeſichu to Zeetunn man-
no Israēta Lauschu/ un Juhda/
fakka tas KUNGS: Un es at-
weddifchu tohs atkat us to Sem-
mi/ ko es winnu Tehweem efuu
dewis/ ka tee to eeinanto.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſchee irr tee Wahrdi/ ko
tas KUNGS irr runnajs no I-
sraēta un no Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Mehs dsirdain weenu Istrehzi-
nafchanas Balkfni/ tur irr Bih-
iafchana/ un ne Meers.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waizajeet jelle/ un rau-
gajt/ arrig weens Wihrṣ dsem-
De? Kapehz tad eraugu es/ fa
kkatrs Wihrs favas Rohkas us
fawahin Ziskahn turr/ itt ka
Seeva/ kas dsemde/ un wisfo
Waigus nobahlejſchus?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waj! jo ta Deena irr tik
eela/ ka neveena winnat lindsa
rraid/ un tas irr Jehkaba Beh-
n Laiks/ tomehr winſch taps
no ta atpestikte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas netiks tai Deena/
fakka tas KUNGS Jebnot: Tad
ausifchu es winna Juhgu no ta-
va Kakla / un faraustischu ta-
vas Saiteṣ/kaSwefcheim wairs
ie buhs likt winnu kaipoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee kalpohs tam KUN-
BAM favain Deewam / un
Dahwidam favam Rehninam/
o es teem eezelfchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu tad ne bihſtees/ mans
alsps Jehkabs/ fakka tas
KUNGS/ un ne bailojees Isra-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es efmu ar tewi/ faſ-
ka tas KUNGS/ ka es tewi is-
glabbju. Jo es darriu Gallu wis-
teem Paganeem / kurp es tewi
eſmu iſkuiſis/ bet tew es nedar-
ritchu Gallu/ bet es pahrmahzi-
ſchu tewi pamchreni/ un ne tur-
refchu tewi * tahdat par neno-
feedsigu.
* Tas irr: Zitta nekahda pehz, ka ween
ta Nopelna Kristus pehz, eekſch ka teem Tiz-
zigeem tee Grehki peedohti tobp, jepſchu tee,
ko tas KUNGS mihto, pahrmahziti tohp.
Eebr: 12, 5, 6. Luk: no ſcheem Wahrdeem:
2. Mohf: Gr: 34,7.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Tawa Waina irr nahwiga/ ta-
wa Wahts ne irr dseedinajama.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neweens irr/ kas tawu
Wainu pahrranga/ ka Wisch/
kas to aisfeen / Dseedinajamas
Sables tew ne irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wisſi tawi Mihkotaji irr
tewi aismirſufscht / tee ne waiza
pehz tewis: Jo eſefmu tewi fit-
tis ar Eenatdneeka Sitteneem/
ar weenas breefmigas Pahrmah-
zifchangs tawo Dauds Noseegu-
nu Deht/ tapehz ka tawt Grehkt
tohti warrent irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ko kleedſi tu pahr tawu
Wainu/ ka tawas Sahpesnah-
wigs irr/ tawas leelas Nosee-
dsibas deht z ka tawt Grehki war-
X 3 ren
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
